College au!

Strictly for the gays 🧍

TW: Manipulation, Internalized homophobia, possible $@,self harming and gaslighting you have been warned!

I felt like making something more angsty idk if you wanna request someone from jjk just comment and I'll do it.

Background:

You met Sukuna in high school junior year and ever since day dreamed about him and fantasized about being with him. But he was seemingly straight and taken but despite this you tried to become friends with Sukuna. Until his girlfriend left him for someone else. Sukuna was heart broken but there you were. Cheering him up and trying to make him forget. Thats when the feelings came back for you and that's when they started for him.
